description_long: This is a sandal-style shoe featuring a combination of blue and gray synthetic straps, secured with metallic rivets and a buckle at the heel. The sandal has an open-toe design, exposing the toes and much of the foot, with three main straps crossing over the top and front of the foot for support. The sole is light beige with a textured, ridged pattern for grip, and appears to be made of a lightweight, flexible material. The straps have visible stitching, adding both durability and a decorative element. The interior is lined with a soft, cushioned material for comfort. The overall design is casual and practical, suitable for urban walking and everyday use.
description: A blue and gray open-toe sandal with multiple synthetic straps, metallic fasteners, and a textured beige sole. The design is casual, comfortable, and ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and gray straps, metallic rivet, and the full length of the textured beige sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open-toe design, arrangement of the straps, and exposed toes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the buckle and strap details, as well as the layered construction of the sole.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel strap and buckle, with the back of the sole visible.
